newFrames.name: Brushed Steel
newFrames.shape: Single solid circle ring, 4px stroke, linear gradient from light gray #D1D5DB through steel #6B7280 to dark gray #4B5563. Simple industrial look.

newFrames.name: Copper Pipe
newFrames.shape: Single circle ring with 5px stroke. Linear gradient from bright copper #F0A050 through dark copper #B45309 to patina green #0D9488 at 100%. Looks like aged copper tubing.

newFrames.name: Hex Bolt
newFrames.shape: Regular hexagon outline (6 sides) with 4px stroke in metallic zinc gradient. Each vertex has a small circle (r=2) filled solid zinc to look like bolt heads.

newFrames.name: Blueprint Border
newFrames.shape: Double concentric circles: outer ring solid 2px stroke #60A5FA, inner ring dashed (strokeDasharray 4 4) 1.5px stroke #93C5FD. Small cross-hair marks at 0, 90, 180, 270 degrees (2px lines). Blueprint engineering aesthetic.

newFrames.name: Titanium Band
newFrames.shape: Thick single circle ring 6px stroke with a subtle linear gradient from near-white #E4E4E7 through titanium #A1A1AA to dark #52525B. Clean, minimal, premium metal look.

newFrames.name: Rivet Ring
newFrames.shape: Circle ring 3px stroke in dark iron gradient. 8 evenly spaced small filled circles (r=2.5) placed ON the ring at 0,45,90,135,180,225,270,315 degrees, simulating rivet heads. Color #A8A29E for rivets.

newFrames.name: Cast Iron
newFrames.shape: Rounded-rectangle frame (rx=35% of side). Stroke 4.5px. Gradient from warm iron #78716C through dark #44403C to charcoal #292524. Sturdy, industrial foundry feel.

newFrames.name: Coil Spring
newFrames.shape: Circle ring using a repeating sinusoidal/wavy path around the circumference (16 bumps inward and outward alternating, bump depth ~3px) creating a coiled spring cross-section effect. Single color stroke #34D399 3px.

newFrames.name: Gear Teeth
newFrames.shape: Gear-shaped polygon: 12 teeth generated as alternating inner/outer radius points (outer=center-2, inner=center-7, tooth width ~15 degrees). Gradient from chrome #D6D3D1 to gunmetal #57534E. Simple single-color gear outline.

newFrames.name: Gasket Seal
newFrames.shape: Single thick circle ring 5px stroke in flat red #DC2626, simulating a rubber O-ring gasket. No gradient, no glow effects. Solid, practical, industrial seal look.

newFrames.name: Bare Wire
newFrames.shape: Single circle ring 3px stroke in copper-wire amber #F59E0B. Thin, minimal, like a single strand of exposed copper wiring bent into a circle.

newFrames.name: Concrete Ring
newFrames.shape: Single thick circle ring 6px stroke in flat concrete gray #A3A3A3. No gradient. Slightly rough appearance via strokeDasharray 1 0.5. Brutalist, raw, construction site aesthetic.

newFrames.name: Torque Wrench
newFrames.shape: Double ring frame: outer circle 3px stroke in steel-blue gradient. Inner circle 1.5px stroke dashed. 4 small wrench-jaw shaped notches (rectangular cutouts ~4px wide) at cardinal points on the outer ring creating a ratchet look.

newFrames.name: Piston Ring
newFrames.shape: Two concentric circles: outer 3px red-to-orange gradient (#EF4444 -> #F97316), inner 2px same gradient offset. 4 connecting 'piston rod' lines between the two rings at 45, 135, 225, 315 degrees (2px stroke). Engine piston cross-section aesthetic.

newFrames.name: Circuit Board
newFrames.shape: Circle ring 3px stroke in PCB green #16A34A. 8 short perpendicular 'trace' lines extending outward from the ring (3px long, 1.5px stroke) at evenly spaced angles. Small filled circles (r=1.5) at the end of each trace, simulating solder pads. Color #4ADE80.

newFrames.name: Thermal Gradient
newFrames.shape: Single circle ring 5px stroke with a 5-stop gradient simulating thermal imaging: deep blue #1E3A8A (cold) at 0%, cyan #06B6D4 at 25%, green #22C55E at 50%, yellow #EAB308 at 75%, red #EF4444 (hot) at 100%. Vivid heat-map rainbow ring.

newFrames.name: Weld Bead
newFrames.shape: Circle ring using a path with small zigzag/chevron pattern around the circumference (24 tiny V-notches, depth ~2px) simulating a MIG weld bead texture. Gradient from bright orange #FB923C to dark amber #92400E. Inner thin glow circle (r=center-6, 1px, opacity 0.3) in yellow.

newFrames.name: First Gold
newFrames.earnDescription: Complete your first golden (fully mastered) lesson
newFrames.shape: Circle ring 4px stroke in matte gold gradient #EAB308 -> #A16207. A single small laurel leaf (ellipse rx=4 ry=2) at the 12 o'clock position, filled gold #FDE68A. Clean, understated achievement frame.

newFrames.name: Marathon Runner
newFrames.earnDescription: Answer 1,000 questions correctly across all lessons
newFrames.shape: Double circle rings (outer 3px, inner 2px, gap of 3px) in royal blue gradient #3B82F6 -> #1D4ED8. Small dot (r=2) on the outer ring representing a runner, with a fading trail of 3 smaller dots (r=1.5, r=1, r=0.5) behind it at decreasing opacity.

newFrames.name: Early Adopter
newFrames.earnDescription: Be among the first 100 users to complete all units (limited edition)
newFrames.shape: Circle ring 4px stroke in sunrise gradient: deep orange #EA580C at bottom (180deg) through warm yellow #FBBF24 at sides to soft pink #FDA4AF at top (0deg). 3 small ray lines (4px long, 1.5px stroke, #FDE68A) extending outward from the top of the ring at -20, 0, +20 degrees. Dawn/sunrise motif.

newFrames.name: Turbine Blade
newFrames.shape: Outer circle ring 2px in sky-blue gradient. 8 curved 'turbine blade' shapes (thin ellipses, rx=8 ry=2) arranged radially inside the ring, each rotated to its angle, creating a turbofan cross-section. Blades use gradient from #38BDF8 to #0284C7. Inner hub circle r=center-8, 1.5px stroke.

newFrames.name: Plasma Arc
newFrames.shape: Three concentric circle rings at r, r-3, r-6 with decreasing stroke widths (3, 2, 1) and decreasing opacity (0.9, 0.6, 0.3). Gradient from electric purple #A855F7 through magenta #EC4899 to hot pink #F472B6. Creates a layered plasma containment field look.

newFrames.name: Star Drive
newFrames.shape: 8-pointed star polygon (alternating outer radius=center-1, inner radius=center-5). Gradient from bright gold #FDE68A through amber #F59E0B to deep gold #B45309. Inner circle ring r=center-7, 1px stroke, dotted. Mechanical star-drive coupling shape.

newFrames.name: Flawless
newFrames.earnDescription: Complete an entire unit with 100% accuracy on every lesson
newFrames.shape: Circle ring 3.5px stroke in emerald-to-teal gradient (#10B981 -> #14B8A6 -> #0D9488). 5 small checkmark shapes (V-paths, 3px tall) evenly spaced on the ring at top, simulating verified/perfect marks. Inner thin circle r-5, 1px, opacity 0.3.

newFrames.name: Speed Demon
newFrames.earnDescription: Complete 10 lessons in a single day
newFrames.shape: Circle ring 3px stroke in electric yellow-to-orange gradient (#FDE047 -> #F59E0B -> #DC2626). 3 lightning bolt SVG path shapes (small, ~6px tall) placed at 120-degree intervals on the ring. Bolts filled with bright yellow #FDE047.

newFrames.name: Perfectionist
newFrames.shape: Three concentric circle rings: outer r, middle r-3, inner r-6. Strokes 2.5px, 2px, 1.5px respectively. Colors from outer to inner: #FCA5A5, #EF4444, #991B1B (red bullseye pattern). Small crosshair lines (4px) at cardinal points on outer ring.

newFrames.name: Singularity
newFrames.shape: Three concentric rings (r, r-3, r-6): outermost 3px stroke in indigo-to-violet gradient, middle 2px dashed (4 8), innermost 1px dotted. All three rings have independent SVG animateTransform rotation: outer 10s clockwise, middle 15s counter-clockwise, inner 20s clockwise. Creates a gravitational lensing vortex.
newFrames.animationDescription: Three rings rotate independently at different speeds and directions, creating an orbital/gravitational effect. Outer glow pulses via CSS animate-pulse.

newFrames.name: Fusion Reactor
newFrames.shape: Outer octagon 3px stroke in cyan-to-teal gradient (#22D3EE -> #0D9488). Inner circle ring r-5, 2px stroke, same gradient. 3 elliptical 'orbit paths' (rx=r*0.9, ry=r*0.3) each rotated 60 degrees apart (0, 60, 120 deg), 1.5px stroke #67E8F9 opacity 0.5, representing electron orbits. Small filled circle (r=2) traveling along each orbit path.
newFrames.animationDescription: Each of the 3 orbit ellipses slowly rotates (dur=12s, 18s, 24s respectively). The small 'electron' dots animate along their orbit paths with SVG animateMotion. Outer glow pulses.

newFrames.name: Supernova
newFrames.shape: 12-pointed starburst (outer=center-1, inner=center-4) with gradient from white-hot #FEF3C7 through gold #F59E0B to deep orange #C2410C to crimson #7F1D1D. Inner circle r-6, 2px stroke gold. 6 tiny 'debris' circles (r=1.5) scattered between the star points at mid-radius.
newFrames.animationDescription: The starburst polygon slowly rotates (dur=25s). The stroke-width animates between 2 and 3.5 (dur=3s) creating a pulsing expansion effect. Each debris circle animates opacity between 0.2 and 1 at staggered intervals. Glow layer pulses.

newFrames.name: Golden Engineer
newFrames.earnDescription: Complete ALL golden lessons in every unit
newFrames.shape: Thick circle ring 5px stroke in luxurious 5-stop gold gradient (#FEF9C3 -> #FDE68A -> #EAB308 -> #CA8A04 -> #FEF9C3). 10 laurel leaf ellipses (rx=4, ry=1.5) evenly spaced on the ring, each rotated tangentially. Inner ring r-5, 1.5px stroke, dashed gold. Crown achievement.
newFrames.animationDescription: Inner dashed ring slowly rotates (dur=30s). The main ring has a subtle shimmer via animated gradient offset cycling. Glow pulses.
